text: Hey! You're on the right page — the **Setup tab** generates Netlify-specific code for you. Here's what you'll typically see there for Netlify: 1. **llms.txt & llms-full.txt files** — Download these and add them to your site's public/static folder so they're served at `https://yourdomain.com/llms.txt` 2. **Tracking pixel code** — A small `` tag to add to your site's footer (or via Netlify's Site Settings → Build & Deploy → Post Processing if you prefer) 3. **robots.txt entries** — Add rules for AI crawlers to your `robots.txt` 4. **Schema/structured data blocks** — JSON-LD code to inject into your site's `` for better AI visibility **The Setup tab shows exactly what to download and where to place it for Netlify.** Since you're on a Netlify site, the code there is already customized for your domain. If the Setup tab isn't showing clear next steps, or if you hit any snags deploying these files, **email hello@flowblinq.ai** and they'll walk you through it. What are you seeing in the Setup tab right now? I can help you interpret it!
